    nanobsd: Add missing options to usage()

    -B suppress installs (both kernel and world)
    -I build disk image from existing build/install
    -W suppress installworld

    PR:             277269
    Reviewed by:    imp, emaste
    Approved by:    emaste (mentor)
    MFC after:      1 month
